s: In 2011, Chris Carpenter suited up for CHC as a pitcher. Key numbers: ERA 2.790, WHIP 1.970, SO 8, WAR -0.100.
Changed teams after the previous season (CHC -> BOS).
In 2012, Chris Carpenter suited up for BOS as a pitcher. Key numbers: ERA 9.000, WHIP 2.830, SO 2, WAR -0.300. Notable context: Joined BOS.
